description: Caller explicitly asks to never be called again. Call Outcome must be dnc_request; no visit.
transcript:
Agent: Hello Vikram, this is Priya from DLF about the Gurugram project.
Caller: How did you get my number? Please remove me from your list and don't call again.
Agent: I understand, I'll remove you right away. Apologies for the disturbance.
Caller: Thank you. Bye.

Call Outcome.subjective: Caller demanded removal from the calling list.
